title: wikstroemia micrantha
intro: Wikstroemia micrantha, also known as Yomogi or Japanese mugwort, is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Wikstroemia micrantha include its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Wikstroemia micrantha is often prepared as a tea or infusion for its herbal remedies, and can also be used in soups or decoctions for its medicinal benefits.
